prompt: A classical oil painting in the style of a 17th-century Dutch master, closely inspired by Vermeer’s composition, showing a teddy bear posed as the subject of a formal portrait. The bear is shown in three-quarter view from the shoulders up against a deep black background, turning its head slightly toward the viewer. It has soft golden-brown plush fur, one rounded fuzzy ear clearly visible and the other partially visible beneath a large blue-and-gold turban wrapped around its head, with a long fabric tail draping down the right side. The bear wears a single oversized pearl earring hanging from the visible ear area, echoing the iconic “girl with a pearl earring” look. The clothing includes 2 visible garments: a warm golden-brown robe or coat and a small white collar at the neckline. Use dramatic chiaroscuro lighting from the left, rich painterly texture, subtle canvas grain, realistic fabric folds, gentle highlights on the pearl, and a museum-quality old master atmosphere. Keep the composition simple, centered, and elegant, with the teddy bear’s face rendered as a plush toy version of a noble portrait subject, blending cute toy texture with fine-art realism.
